summary.summary: Refactor in fastlane/Fastfile: the line Spaceship::ConnectAPI.client.provisioning_request_client.instance_variable_set(:@current_team_id, "#{TEAMID}") was made conditional so it only runs when there are missing capabilities (i.e., appended with unless missing.empty?). (See diff: commit:96647e3425707fda55dd3b6776c075dc5f3e952d and file:fastlane/Fastfile.)
summary.userFacingImpact: No direct user-facing behavior is shown in the provided change. The change prevents setting @current_team_id on the provisioning_request_client when there are no missing capabilities, which appears intended to avoid unnecessary updates. The supplied sources do not provide evidence of downstream effects; human review is recommended to confirm there are no side effects.
